title: Industry Analyst Discusses Impact of Intel vPro Technology
author: Intel Corporation (featuring Peter S. Kastner)
abstract: Intel-published YouTube video (URL http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Qtr3rqJAzUI, uploaded 2008-09-23, ~1:38 duration) featuring industry analyst Peter Kastner discussing the impact of Intel vPro technology — specifically the total cost of ownership benefits — for Core 2 vPro and Centrino 2 vPro platforms. Webarchive captures the YouTube watch-page chrome and tag metadata (total_cost_of_ownership, Peter_Kastner, core_2_vpro, Centrino_2_vpro). Skill §13.1 type: transcript.
importance_rationale: Vendor-published analyst-relations video featuring Kastner — extends the Kastner industry-analyst footprint into video media in the late-Aberdeen / early-Scott-Page period and documents 2008 Intel vPro AR strategy.
relevance_rationale: Intel vPro remains an active business-PC platform; TCO framing for managed endpoints (now Endpoint Management Assistant / Intel AMT) continues to be marketed. Sponsored-analyst-video format became ubiquitous in B2B AR.
prescience_rationale: Sponsored vendor content; not predictive in nature. vPro TCO arguments did remain industry talking points through the 2010s but content does not contain specific predictions to evaluate.
